title: erigeron abajoensis
intro: Erigeron abajoensis, also known as Abajo Fleabane, is a rare species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to New Mexico, USA. As a member of the Asteraceae family, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erigeron abajoensis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
